questions.question_text_full:
Select the correct option that indicates the arrangement of the following words in a logical and meaningful order.
1. Design 2. Test 3. Conceptualize 4. Develop 5. Implement
questions.notes: The options are labeled a, b, c, d in the source, mapped to 1, 2, 3, 4 respectively.
